label: Icon
description: Simple icon generation for app icons, UI icons, and feature symbols.

optional.name: usage
optional.description: Where the icon will be used

optional.name: keyword
optional.description: Optional text or label implied by the icon

fragments.subject: a single icon representing {{concept}} for {{usage}}, based on {{shapeHint}}
fragments.style: flat icon design, {{styleTone}}, crisp edges, scalable, software-product friendly
fragments.composition: single isolated icon, centered, no scene, no extra objects

notes: Best for concepting raster icons quickly; production UI icon packs may still need vector cleanup.
